system.notes:
One-man construction capsule with manipulator arms and rocket thrusters; very limited range.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.35): Work Module · 5 · 1 · 0 · Chemical · 2 · Batteries, Solar Arrays · 30% · 1 · 4m3 · 1 · 7 · 1 · 4 · 2 · None

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 5 million eb; Crew 1; Passengers 0; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 2; Power Type Batteries, Solar Arrays; Sensors 30%; Computers 1; Cargo 4m3; Actions 1; Weapon Spaces 7; Armor (max SP) 1; Damage Points 4; Overkill Points 2; Shuttlecraft None.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
